about.title: Process & About
about.story1: I am Christophe Martin, a designer obsessed with YouTube analytics, visual hierarchy, and the psychology behind a click. I don't just make pretty images; I build custom visual hooks that stop the scroll.
about.story2: When working with creators, my focus is speed and clarity. I provide quick replies, fast iterations, and a deep understanding of the YouTube algorithm so you can focus on making great videos.

process.step1_desc: We clarify your hook, title, and audience.
process.services_list: Single thumbnails · Thumbnail packs · Channel branding

contact.title: Let's Talk

contact.value_prop: Reply within 24 hours · English & French · Available for ongoing thumbnail packages.
